productDisplayName: Kibou Mini Nylon Wallet Belt Bag
detailsText: Product DetailsA bag designed for your essentials, the Mini is made with you in mind, your style, your stuff, your peace of mind.Get creative with what you can carry along with these functional, simplified, perfectly sized mini fanny pack.Compliant with the highest safety standards (California Prop 65).Durable, easily cleanable nylon exterior.Wipeable and stain-resistant recycled nylon lining.DimensionsMade from recycled nylonDimensions: 8.25” x 4.75” x 2.75” (21cm x 12cm x 7cm)Belt measures: 33”-49"Built-in wallet for cards, cash and coinsInternal big hook for keysWe recommend using a damp washcloth and dish soap to clean up non-staining soiled spots from the exterior and interior of your Kibou bagTry not to submerge your changing pad in water as this can damage the fluff of the foam insideYou can use disinfecting wipes gently over the soiled areasWe recommend not using heavy disinfecting chemicals or harsh abrasive wipes frequently as it can damage the unique properties that protect your vegan leather from day-to-day wear and tearBe gentle with your Kibou when cleaning to get the most life out of your bagProduct #1169515
